metadata.title: Life Event Data Standard
metadata.description: Standardised data fields for describing an life event that has occurred in a person's life.

entities.name: LifeEvent
entities.description: The life event that has occurred.

fields.name: Identifier
fields.description: Unique identifiers (IDs) associated with the life event.

children.name: value
children.description: A single unique identifier attached to the life event (e.g., ?).

children.name: system
children.description: System that the identifier adheres to (e.g., ?).

fields.name: Type
fields.description: Code for the type of the life event (e.g. birth, death).

fields.name: SubjectPerson
fields.description: References to Person(s) involved in the life event.

children.name: ref
children.description: A reference to a Person record involved in the life event.

children.name: involvement
children.description: Code for the nature of the Person's involvement in the life event.

fields.name: RelatedProfessional
fields.description: References to Professional(s) involved in the life event.

children.name: ref
children.description: A reference to a Professional record involved in the life event.

children.name: involvement
children.description: Code for the nature of the Person's involvement in the life event.

fields.name: RelatedService
fields.description: References to Service(s) involved in the life event.

children.name: ref
children.description: A reference to a Service record involved in the life event.

fields.name: TimeInformation
fields.description: Details about timing of the life event

children.name: startDateTime
children.description: DateTime (ISO-8601) for start of the life event.

children.name: endDateTime
children.description: DateTime (ISO-8601) for end of the life event.

children.name: frequency
children.description: Frequency of the life event (incl. whether spontaneous or not).

fields.name: LocationInformation
fields.description: Details about the location of the life event
